subcodes.first_line: The Book of God proclaimeth, and the Sun of Truth hath risen effulgent, its light shining with the Word "Verily, He is God" after all things have passed away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ناطق و آفتاب حقیقت مشرق نور وجه با کلمه انه هو الله بعد فناء اشیا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for protection, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
